{{Quote|Good Imperials…like my own father…are as bad as Grigor.|[[Ranulf Trommer/Legends|Ranulf Trommer]] to [[Mora]]|<ref name="River of Chaos 4">[[River of Chaos 4|''River of Chaos'' 4]]</ref>}}
'''Trommer''' was an [[Human/Legends|human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Admiral/Legends|admiral]] under the command of [[Grand Moff/Legends|Grand Moff]] [[Lynch Hauser]] and was the father of [[Ranulf Trommer/Legends|Ranulf Trommer]]. He saved his son from being shot by Hauser by "accidentally" bumping into the Grand Moff, throwing off his shot.

{{Char-stub}}
